Who I Am

Ashley Borde

12+ Years 28+ Projects

My Story

My journey into UX design started long before I knew the term existed.

As a child, I loved storytelling. Whenever I discovered a new place, climbed a tree, or had an exciting experience, I'd come home and sketch it for my mother. Drawing was how I communicated stories, emotions, and experiences.
That passion led me into design. I spent years creating everything from cars and architectural concepts to marketing materials. Eventually, I joined an advertising agency, where I learned how design could capture attention and communicate value.
But one question stayed with me. Ads generated clicks and campaigns generated views—but I became fascinated by what happened next. When a website I worked on started delivering measurable business results, I realized design could help people achieve goals and create real impact.
That's when I discovered UX. Suddenly everything connected — the storyteller in me wanted to understand people's journeys, the designer in me wanted to simplify complexity, and the problem-solver in me wanted to create value for both users and businesses.
"Great UX isn't just about reducing friction — it's about respecting people's time while creating meaningful outcomes for everyone involved."
Design Philosophy

Design Philosophy

I believe design should help people achieve their goals with clarity, confidence, and minimal effort.

Reduce Uncertainty
Set expectations early. Help users know what's happening, what's needed, and what comes next.
Make the Next Step Obvious
The best experience is one where users never have to think about what to do next.
Respect People's Time
Every unnecessary click or confusing step costs users time — and businesses trust.
Create Mutual Value
Good UX serves both the user's goals and the business's growth — not one at the expense of the other.

Looking Ahead

Looking Ahead

Today I'm solving problems on screens. In the future, I hope to solve larger problems that impact people's everyday lives — making life a little easier, a little clearer, and a little better for the people experiencing it.

Experience & Expertise

Resume

I design products that help users achieve their goals effortlessly while helping businesses grow sustainably.

Over the last 12+ years, I've worked across SaaS, eCommerce, B2B, enterprise, and legacy products—launching products from 0→1, redesigning complex workflows, building design teams, and creating experiences that have directly contributed to business revenue and product adoption.

My approach combines user psychology, business strategy, and systems thinking to create experiences that are intuitive for users, valuable for businesses, and scalable for the future.
